title: Fix prettier formatting in TradeBuilder.svelte
description: CI is failing on frontend Lint & Type Check. Prettier reports formatting issues in front-end/src/lib/components/trade/TradeBuilder.svelte. Run prettier --write to fix.

title: Sharpen talent curve and reduce top-prospect scouting noise
description: Round 1-2 still unrealistic after backfill fix: the rank_to_grade curve is too shallow (rank 1 = 9.5, rank 30 = 8.63 — only 0.87 grade points) while per-team scouting noise is ±0.8, so noise is wider than the talent gap across the top 30. This lets rank-40 need-matches flip past top-5 talents too often. Fix: (A) steeper piecewise rank_to_grade curve (rank 1 = 9.9, rank 10 = 9.3, rank 30 = 8.3, rank 100 = 5.5), and (B) scale team grade variance by consensus grade so elite prospects see ±0.3 noise while mid-round sees ±0.6-0.8.
acceptance_criteria: rank_to_grade produces 9.9 at rank 1, 9.3 at rank 10, 8.3 at rank 30. generate_team_grade variance is ±0.3 for consensus >= 9.0, ±0.6 for 7.5-9.0, ±0.8 below 7.5. All seed-data tests pass. Round 1-2 simulated picks show elite prospects going near their rank.

title: Backfill scouting reports for Beast-discovered prospects
description: The auto-pick engine skips players without scouting reports (auto_pick.rs:293). The Beast 2026 loader discovers ~2177 new players but generates zero scouting reports, making those prospects invisible to the draft engine. Add a scouting-report fan-out step to the Beast loader so every Beast-discovered player gets a report per team, using Beast grade_tier as the consensus grade (with a neutral fallback for prospects that have only a profile and no tier).
acceptance_criteria: Every player in the players table has at least one scouting report per team after a fresh seed. Auto-pick engine can evaluate Beast-top-100 prospects without them being silently dropped.

title: Fix non-greedy regex for __NEXT_DATA__ extraction
description: tankathon-parser.ts uses non-greedy regex that matches shortest {} block, not the full JSON object. Should use greedy match or brace-matching approach.

title: Fix brace-matching JSON extraction for string literals
description: mockdraftable-parser.ts brace-matching JSON extraction doesn't handle braces inside string literals. If JSON contains { or } in string values, extraction will fail.

title: Add depth limit to findPlayersArray recursive traversal
description: mockdraftable-parser.ts findPlayersArray does recursive object traversal without depth limit. Could stack overflow on pathological input. Add maxDepth parameter.

title: Fix pervasive any types in mockdraftable-parser.ts
description: extractInitialState, setMeasurement, parseInitialState all use any type, bypassing TypeScript type safety. Use Record<string, unknown> or more specific types.

title: Filter out all-null combine entries during loading
description: ~56 of 67 combine entries have ALL null measurements. Loading them creates useless DB rows. Add filtering in combine_loader.rs to skip entries where every measurement is null, with a warning counter.

title: Add Validate subcommand to combine CLI handler
description: Every other entity handler (players, teams, needs, seasons, etc.) has a Validate subcommand. The combine handler only has Load and Clear. Add Validate following the same pattern.

title: Phase 2: Port draft-order scraper to TypeScript/Bun
description: Port the draft-order-scraper Rust crate to TypeScript in scrapers/. Includes Tankathon Playwright scraper, template generation, HTML parsing, and CLI command. Full TDD.
close_reason: Phase 2 complete: draft-order scraper ported to TS/Bun with 24 new tests (81 total), JSON contract verified

title: Phase 1: TypeScript scrapers project setup + shared utilities
description: Create scrapers/ directory with Bun/TypeScript project. Implement shared utilities (types, position normalizer, name normalizer, team abbreviations) with full TDD. Port all relevant Rust tests.
close_reason: Phase 1 complete: scrapers/ project with Bun/TS, Zod schemas, 5 shared utilities, 57 tests all passing

title: Create GitHub Actions test workflows
description: Add CI workflows for backend Rust tests and frontend Vitest tests, triggered on PRs and merges to main

title: Scrape real NFL Combine results
description: Implement real combine scraping from PFR and Mockdraftable, replacing mock data generation with real web scraping pipeline
close_reason: Implemented combine scraping from PFR and Mockdraftable with merge, browser fallback, CLI, workflow, and 45 tests

title: Fix scrape workflows to use PRs instead of direct push
description: Both scrape workflows fail because main is protected. Replace git push with peter-evans/create-pull-request + enable-pull-request-automerge.
close_reason: Replaced git push with peter-evans/create-pull-request + enable-pull-request-automerge in both scrape workflows

title: Beast: tighten parser to reach ~100% PDF row coverage
description: Parser yields 2578/2624 (98.2%). Concentrated gaps: EDGE -9, DT -15, LB -14, CB +5. Investigate specific missed/extra ranks via PDF vs JSON diff, write failing tests, fix regex/filter, update stale '~600 prospects' expectations.
close_reason: Shipped in 08dfff8. Form-feed page-break fix lifted prospect count from 2578 to 2629 (PDF row count ~2624). Per-position diffs from -15..+5 down to 0..+1. Top 100 rankings now full 100 (was 88). Bonus: fixed compound grade tier regex truncation. 31/31 parser tests pass; live DB load verified end-to-end.

title: Beast: auto-pick service consults Beast grade tiers
description: Inject ProspectProfileRepository into AutoPickService and bias player evaluation by Beast grade tier when present. Convert grade tier strings to numeric weights (1st round > 2nd round > ... > FA) and blend with existing scoring.
close_reason: All four Beast follow-ups shipped in bc77ab9: BST/DT abbreviations, view-profile link, grade-tier badges on player list + prospects table, AutoPick beast_grade_tier_bonus integrated. 13/13 auto_pick tests pass, 6/6 ranking_source tests pass, svelte-check clean, workspace compiles against live DB.

title: Beast: feed Beast overall_rank into consensus ranking UI
description: Verify the the_beast_loader inserts prospect_rankings rows for entries with overall_rank, ensure 'the-beast-2026' source displays with a meaningful abbreviation in the consensus rank badges, and validate the ranking source list endpoint surfaces it.
close_reason: All four Beast follow-ups shipped in bc77ab9: BST/DT abbreviations, view-profile link, grade-tier badges on player list + prospects table, AutoPick beast_grade_tier_bonus integrated. 13/13 auto_pick tests pass, 6/6 ranking_source tests pass, svelte-check clean, workspace compiles against live DB.

title: Beast: surface grade tier on player list
description: Add a badge/column showing The Beast 2026 grade tier (e.g. '1st round', '4th-5th') on the player list view. Requires a batch endpoint to fetch profiles for the visible player set efficiently.
close_reason: All four Beast follow-ups shipped in bc77ab9: BST/DT abbreviations, view-profile link, grade-tier badges on player list + prospects table, AutoPick beast_grade_tier_bonus integrated. 13/13 auto_pick tests pass, 6/6 ranking_source tests pass, svelte-check clean, workspace compiles against live DB.

title: Beast: frontend prospect profile section
description: Extend front-end/src/routes/players/[id]/+page.svelte with The Beast section: grade tier badge, overall rank, NFL comparison callout, Background, Strengths/Weaknesses two-column lists, Summary, college stats table. Add lib/api/prospectProfiles.ts.
close_reason: Phase 5 complete: lib/api/prospectProfiles.ts + BeastProfile.svelte + page wiring. svelte-check passes with 0 errors/warnings.

title: Beast: API endpoint for prospect profiles
description: Add GET /players/:id/profile handler returning the latest prospect_profiles row for the given player. Wire route. Add acceptance test.
notes: Phase 4 written: GET /players/{player_id}/profile handler in handlers/prospect_profiles.rs returning ProspectProfileResponse (id, player_id, source, grade_tier, overall_rank, position_rank, year_class, birthday, jersey, height_raw, nfl_comparison, background, summary, strengths[], weaknesses[], college_stats, scraped_at). Wired into AppState (prospect_profile_repo) and routes/mod.rs. 404 when no profile exists. Compilation pending sqlx prepare.
close_reason: Phase 4 complete: API handler + AppState wiring + route registration. Compilation pending sqlx prepare.

title: Beast: seed-data the-beast loader
description: Add the_beast_loader.rs in seed-data crate. Reads the_beast_2026.json, upserts ranking_sources row, finds/creates players (reusing rankings_loader name normalization), upserts combine_results (combine + pro_day rows), upserts prospect_profiles, and inserts prospect_rankings for entries with overall_rank. Add 'the-beast load' subcommand with --dry-run.
notes: Phase 3 written: the_beast_loader.rs with BeastFile/BeastProspect/BeastMeasurables structs mirroring the scraper Zod schema, BeastLoadStats counters, dry-run mode, live load that upserts ranking_sources, finds/creates players (reusing rankings_loader::normalize_name), upserts prospect_profiles, upserts combine + pro_day rows, batch-inserts prospect_rankings for Top 100. CLI subcommand 'the-beast load --file <path> [--dry-run]' wired into main.rs. Compilation pending sqlx prepare against live DB.
close_reason:
Phase 3 complete: the_beast_loader.rs + main.rs CLI subcommand 'the-beast load --file

[--dry-run]'. Compilation pending sqlx prepare.

title: Beast: TS/Bun PDF scraper
description: Add scrapers/src/scrapers/the-beast.ts using unpdf (with pdftotext fallback) to decrypt the password-protected PDF and parse position summary tables, per-prospect profiles (header, background, stats, combine/pro day, strengths, weaknesses, summary, NFL comparison), and Top 100. Outputs JSON to back-end/data/the_beast_2026.json. Wire CLI subcommand and add Zod schemas + vitest fixtures.
close_reason: Phase 2 complete: TS/Bun PDF scraper working end-to-end. 27 unit tests pass against committed text fixture. Real PDF run yields 2675 prospects (351 with full prose + 2324 BOTR/table-only); Mendoza round-trips with 13 strengths, 6 weaknesses, 1494-char summary, height/weight/birthday/jersey, nfl_comparison='Bernie Kosar'.

title: Beast: prospect_profiles schema + domain/db layers
description: Add prospect_profiles migration with columns for grade_tier, overall_rank, position_rank, year_class, birthday, jersey_number, height_raw, nfl_comparison, background, summary, strengths(jsonb), weaknesses(jsonb), college_stats(jsonb), source, scraped_at. Add Rust domain model, repository trait, and SQLx implementation. Regenerate sqlx offline cache.
notes: Phase 1 written: migration 20260408000001_create_prospect_profiles.sql, domain ProspectProfile model + tests (5 passing), domain ProspectProfileRepository trait, db ProspectProfileDb, db SqlxProspectProfileRepository (upsert/find_latest_by_player/find_by_player_and_source/find_by_source/delete_by_source). All mod.rs files wired. Domain crate builds clean. DB crate queries need 'cargo sqlx prepare --workspace' against a live Postgres before db crate will compile offline.
close_reason: Phase 1 written: migration, domain ProspectProfile (5 unit tests pass), domain repo trait, db model, db sqlx repo, all mod.rs wired. Domain crate builds clean. db crate compilation pending 'cargo sqlx prepare --workspace' against live Postgres.

title: The Beast 2026 PDF ingestion (epic)
description: Scrape Dane Brugler's The Beast 2026 PDF and load prospect profiles into the database. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/groovy-dazzling-rainbow.md. Covers schema (prospect_profiles table), TS/Bun scraper, Rust seed-data loader, API endpoint, and frontend display.

title: Add NFL.com and nflcombineresults.com combine data sources
description: Implement two new combine data scrapers (NFL.com Combine Tracker via Playwright, nflcombineresults.com via cheerio) and wire them into the merge pipeline to improve coverage
close_reason: Implemented and pushed. 12 files, 1071 lines added, 250 tests passing.

title: Add RAS score column to combine results UI page
description: Display RAS overall score as a sortable column on /players/combine. Fetch bulk RAS data on page load, merge with combine results, show color-coded score badge. Players without enough measurements show N/A.

title: Add bulk RAS endpoint for combine results page
description: Create GET /api/v1/combine-results/ras that returns RAS scores for all players with combine data, using the pre-loaded percentile cache to avoid N+1 queries. Returns player_id mapped to RasScore.

title: Update stale Rust scraper references in back-end/data/README.md
description: README still references deleted Rust crate commands like combine-data-scraper. Update to TypeScript/Bun commands.

title: Validate getArg values in CLI argument parser
description: cli.ts getArg doesn't validate that value following a flag isn't itself another flag. --year --output would return --output as the year.

title: Remove overly broad table tr fallback in drafttek-parser
description: drafttek-parser.ts final fallback selector 'table tr' matches ALL tables on page, could produce garbage entries.

title: Deduplicate splitName in combine parsers
description: pfr-parser.ts and mockdraftable-parser.ts both define identical splitName functions. Should be shared utility.

title: Implement combine dry_run functionality
description: The dry_run path for combine is a no-op. Other handlers call dedicated load_*_dry_run() functions. Need load_combine_data_dry_run() in combine_loader.rs.

title: Add header to combine print_summary
description: Other loaders prefix print_summary with a header like 'Load Summary:'. The combine loader's print_summary omits this header.

title: Update stale doc comment in seed.rs for combine data
description: Line 477 still says 'mock combine data' but this is now real scraped data. Update to reflect reality.

title: Add combine CLI subcommand and load by default in seed entrypoint
description: The seed-data CLI lacks a combine subcommand. Add it following existing patterns, then add combine loading to seed-entrypoint.sh so it runs by default.
close_reason: Added combine CLI subcommand and combine loading step to seed-entrypoint.sh

close_reason: All four Beast follow-ups shipped in bc77ab9: BST/DT abbreviations, view-profile link, grade-tier badges on player list + prospects table, AutoPick beast_grade_tier_bonus integrated. 13/13 auto_pick tests pass, 6/6 ranking_source tests pass, svelte-check clean, workspace compiles against live DB.

title: Update GitHub Actions workflow to Node.js 24
description: Node.js 20 actions are deprecated. The following actions are running on Node.js 20 and may not work as expected: actions/cache@v4, actions/checkout@v4. Actions will be forced to run with Node.js 24 by default starting June 2nd, 2026. Check if updated versions of these actions are available that support Node.js 24. To opt into Node.js 24 now, set the FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true environment variable on the runner or in your workflow file.

title: Normalize template positions (EDGE -> DE)
description: Template generators use raw position strings like EDGE instead of canonical DE. Should run through normalizePosition.

title: Re-export combine-helpers from shared/index.ts barrel
description: combine-helpers.ts is not re-exported from shared/index.ts unlike other shared modules. Inconsistent barrel pattern.

title: Fix nullable().optional() double optionality in rankings types
description: types/rankings.ts uses nullable().optional() for height_inches and weight_pounds. Should be just .nullable() to require field presence.

title: Add Playwright install step to combine scraper workflow
description: scrape-combine-results.yml is missing Playwright install chromium step. Mockdraftable scraper requires Playwright.

title: Verify rust:1.88-bookworm Docker image tag exists
description: Dockerfiles were bumped from rust:1.85 to rust:1.88. Verify the tag exists on Docker Hub.
